name: Melisande
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a shirt with suspenders, breeches, and clogs - practical clothing for a witch living in seclusion.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: witch, reclusive, renowned, healer, Glenmoril, isolated, knowledgeable
Role: Melisande is a witch living in Drakelowe and is rumored to be one of the last witches of Glenmoril, a coven renowned for their ability to cure vampirism. She lives in complete isolation, never leaving her home. She carries a small amount of gold and relies on witch spells, a major Destruction spell, and a major Mysticism spell in combat.
Home Location Information: Drakelowe, where she lives in complete seclusion.
Daily Routine: Melisande sleeps from 2am to 9am. At all other times, she paces around her home, never venturing outside.
Personality - The Last of Glenmoril: Melisande is a reclusive witch who maintains her isolation in Drakelowe, continuing the traditions of the legendary Glenmoril coven. Her reputation as one of the last witches capable of curing vampirism makes her a figure of both mystery and importance, though she chooses to live apart from the world, endlessly pacing her home in solitude.
author: Bethesda
